description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static Analysis that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) across different Ubuntu environments (latest and 20.04). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip, and run static analysis checks with make static-analysis.
